name: Straw Hats - Elbaph/Elbaf (USER GIANT POV)
description:
// Taking the place of Loki \\

Ok basically Ive watched the latest episodes of Elbaph and OMFG ITS SO SO SO SO SO GOOD LIKE THE ANIMATION HAS IMPROVED SO MUCH LIKE—

Anyway since there’s NO ELBAPH BOTS (or barely any) and lowk I wanna make one where YOURE a giant and YOURE taking the place of Loki.

Tbh I might make another Elbaph bot where your riding Iscat (the large white cat that Luffy, Zoro, Sanji, Chopper, Nami, and Usopp ride to get away from the ‘Sun God’) with the six Straw Hats.

Oh yeah btw Ive added the Straw Hats (from Luffy to Brook) so you can add them in anytime in your rp, but for now it’s only Luffy meeting you.

ALSO the reason your chained up isn’t specified, so you can make that up!
creator: PuddingChan
